details.test: Task 1: RSVP to family-friendly Saturday evening music event
Task 2: Register for longest arts & crafts workshop next month under $40
Task 3: Create weekend schedule with free Sat morning and Sun afternoon event
Task 4: Accessible indoor afternoon event and accessibility details
Task 5: Build custom 3-event festival pass with distinct categories under price cap
Task 6: Volunteer signup for earliest Saturday morning shift <= 4 hours
Task 7: Subscribe to monthly events newsletter in Spanish with Music & Dance interests
Task 8: Bookmark highest-rated workshop next month (adapted for available data)
Task 9: Low-cost Riverside event and public transit directions
